title: Fetching User Availability via API
excerpt:
Hello! 
I see that user availability/status has been rolled out to my account. 
 
Is there any way I can get these values for a user directly through the API?

posts.author: PabloVerano (Pablo Verano)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
I see that user availability/status has been rolled out to my account.

Is there any way I can get these values for a user directly through the API?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Pablo, this isn’t possible yet but I’ll add it to the feature requests category other users can upvote this request!
